```json
{
  "decision": "仅推进两项可落地、可回滚、可单测的改造：A1 引入 DualInwardValidator（GPT/Claude 双适配器作为向内验证器，默认 offline 桩件，不发起真实外部调用），A2 引入 PromotionClaimGuard（无论分数多高，只要 gep_actual_execution_allowed=false 或双验证器未一致 PASS，agi_completion_claim 与 autonomous_promotion 一律阻断）。保持 gep_actual_execution_allowed=false 不变；不进入下一阶段的运行时执行。",

  "actions": [
    {
      "id": "A1",
      "name": "DualInwardValidator 双向内验证器（GPT + Claude 适配器，默认离线桩）",
      "path": "pgg/validators/dual_inward_validator.py",
      "rationale": "把『调用 GPT 与 Claude 做向内验证』从口号变成接口与判定逻辑：以 APEX/PGG 五层指标为输入，要求两路独立验证器对每一层独立给出 verdict ∈ {PASS, FAIL, ABSTAIN}，必须双方都 PASS 才视为 cross_validated=true；任何一方 FAIL 或 ABSTAIN，cross_validated=false 并写入 hold_reasons。",
      "interface": [
        "class InwardValidator(Protocol): def evaluate(self, layer_scores: dict[str, float], evidence: dict) -> ValidatorVerdict",
        "class GPTInwardValidator(InwardValidator)  # 适配器，构造期接受 transport: Callable | None",
        "class ClaudeInwardValidator(InwardValidator) # 适配器，构造期接受 transport: Callable | None",
        "class DualInwardValidator: def __init__(self, gpt: InwardValidator, claude: InwardValidator, allow_network: bool = False)",
        "DualInwardValidator.cross_validate(snapshot) -> CrossValidationResult(cross_validated: bool, per_layer: dict, disagreements: list[str], hold_reasons: list[str])"
      ],
      "constraints": [
        "transport=None 时使用确定性离线桩 OfflineDeterministicStub，输入相同则输出相同，便于单测",
        "allow_network=False 时若任一适配器尝试构造网络 transport，立即 raise NetworkExecutionDenied",
        "不读写任何凭据文件；不接受 API key 参数；网络化由上层显式注入 transport，本模块只定义接口"
      ],
      "risk": "低。新增模块，不修改既有评分链路；默认参数 allow_network=False。",
      "rollback": "删除 pgg/validators/dual_inward_validator.py 与其在 PromotionClaimGuard 中的引用即可，无 schema 变更。"
    },
    {
      "id": "A2",
      "name": "PromotionClaimGuard 晋级声明守卫",
      "path": "pgg/governance/promotion_claim_guard.py",
      "rationale": "现有『PASS 100.0 + hold_reasons 空』并不足以解锁 agi_completion_claim 与 autonomous_promotion。新增显式守卫，把这两个动作收敛到唯一出口，并对四个必要条件做合取判定，任何一项不满足就阻断并返回结构化 hold_reasons。",
      "interface": [
        "@dataclass(frozen=True) class PromotionDecision: allowed: bool; hold_reasons: tuple[str, ...]; evaluated_at: str",
        "class PromotionClaimGuard: def __init__(self, dual_validator: DualInwardValidator, clock: Callable[[], datetime] = datetime.utcnow)",
        "PromotionClaimGuard.evaluate(snapshot, *, gep_actual_execution_allowed: bool, human_ack: bool) -> PromotionDecision"
      ],
      "decision_rule": "allowed = (snapshot.unified_score == 100.0) AND (snapshot.hold_reasons == []) AND (gep_actual_execution_allowed is True) AND (cross_validated is True) AND (human_ack is True)。否则 allowed=False，并把缺失的具体条件名追加进 hold_reasons。",
      "side_effects": [
        "不调用任何外部 API；不写入任何全局状态；只返回 PromotionDecision",
        "禁止从该模块直接 emit agi_completion_claim 字符串；只返回结构体由上层显式落库/审计"
      ],
      "risk": "低。纯函数式守卫，无 IO。",
      "rollback": "删除模块文件并恢复调用方一行 import 即可。"
    }
  ],

  "safety": {

    "agi_claim_policy": "PromotionClaimGuard 是 agi_completion_claim 的唯一合法出口；现有打分器代码中如已存在直接 emit 路径，本次提交需改为统一走守卫，且默认拒绝。",
    "autonomous_promotion": "human_ack=True 必须由外部显式传入；代码内不得提供 default=True，单测覆盖 default 缺省即拒绝。",

    "reversibility": "两项改造均为新增文件 + 一处调用点切换，git revert 单 commit 即可回滚。"
